spec.name: The Tunnel
spec.description: The walls of this small tunnel are almost completely covered in a strange orange moss that flakes off to the touch. The tunnel leads in an east-west direction and the air within is very damp and very stagnant. There is no detectable breeze at all but a strange smell emanates from the east. There is a small, almost unnoticed hole in the southern wall.

south.description: The hole looks very small. You will probably have to crawl through it.

extra_descs.description: The moss on the walls is orange. When you touch it, it feels very scrubby and flakes off to the touch leaving a slight orange tinge on your fingertips.
